name: Crisp Pasta and Goat Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 Hearts of palm, cut into 1/4-in slices
16 Cherry tomatoes or yellow Teardrop tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan with hot corn oil, deep-fry the wonton skins one at a time until crisp, about 15 seconds per side (do not allow oil to smoke). Set aside.
2. In a bowl, thoroughly mix the goat cheese, cream cheese, sour cream, chives, parsley, thyme, garlic, and shallots. Season to taste with freshly ground pepper. Set aside.
3. To prepare the dressing: In an electric blender, place the mustard, garlic, salt, white pepper, and vinegar. With the blender running, slowly add the olive oil in a thin, steady stream until the mixture thickens to dressing consistency. Set aside.
4. To prepare the lettuce: Separate the lettuce leaves, then tear each leaf into bite-size pieces. In a large bowl, toss the lettuce with enough dressing to evenly coat all the pieces. Set aside.
5. Assemble each salad: Spread some of the goat cheese mixture on one side of each deep-fried wonton skin. On 4 plates, place a wonton, cheese-side up. Stack some lettuce pieces on the wonton. Top with a second wonton, cheese-side down. Some lettuce will spread onto the plate. Garnish each salad with heart of palm slices and cherry/yellow teardrop tomato halves, drizzled with remaining dressing. Makes 4 salads.
